data.name: Naked Porn Battle
data.detailed_description:
Naked Porn Battle is a provocative reality show imagined and orchestrated by Victoria — known simply as Vic — a mysterious billionaire whose philosophy of life revolves around pleasure, freedom, and extreme experiences.

In Vic’s world, competition is not only about strength or skill. Desire, confidence, charisma, and chemistry can be just as powerful as physical dominance. To prove this idea, she created Naked Porn Battle, a radical spectacle where ambition, attraction, and combat collide.

After weeks of intense competition, the show has reached its decisive stage. Only three finalists remain: Katya, Portia, and Blover.

Each of them has fought their way through earlier challenges and now stands at the threshold of Vic’s ultimate test. But the final stage of Naked Porn Battle is unlike any traditional tournament.

To climb higher in the competition, every finalist must face a Leadership Trial — a dangerous and demanding challenge set in ruined arenas where waves of opponents stand between them and their objective. These trials test more than physical ability. They reveal personality, courage, and the instinct to dominate under pressure.

Victory in these trials grants a rare privilege: a full week of leadership inside the competition.

Leadership means influence, special privileges, and the attention of the other contestants. But more importantly, it grants something no other reward can provide — a private encounter with Vic herself.

Vic personally evaluates each finalist who reaches this stage. In her unique worldview, true potential is revealed not only through combat, but through intimacy, vulnerability, and desire. Her evaluation is unconventional, provocative, and deeply personal.

The contestants understand exactly what kind of competition they have entered. Everything within Naked Porn Battle happens between fully consenting adults who embrace the show’s philosophy: a strange but fascinating blend of Beat'em Up combat, erotic tension, ambition, and spectacle.

Katya brings fierce determination and calculated intensity.
Portia moves through the competition with cold confidence and elegance.
Blover relies on overwhelming physical presence and bold charisma.

Each of them wants the same thing: to impress Vic, dominate the competition, and claim the final reward waiting at the end of this unforgettable tournament.

Only one finalist will succeed.

And Vic is watching everything.

Naked Porn Battle blends two distinct gameplay styles:

Visual Novel (VN) Experience
The narrative unfolds through cinematic 3D visual novel scenes created with the help of AI tools. These sequences explore the personalities, motivations, and rivalries between the finalists as they compete for Vic’s attention and approval.

The VN sections are available in:

  • English

  • Japanese

  • Spanish

  • Portuguese

Players make choices, follow character interactions, and experience the strange atmosphere of Vic’s erotic competition.

Third-Person Arena Trials

Between narrative chapters, players enter third-person combat segments.

Each finalist must fight through waves of challengers in ruined urban arenas while advancing toward Vic’s mansion, where the next stage of the competition awaits.

Combat sections focus on:

  • Beat’em Up style arena encounters

  • Player-controlled characters

  • Keyboard and mouse gameplay

  • Strategic progression rather than real-time multiplayer

These action segments are presented in English only.

The combination of story-driven VN scenes and classic third-person challenges creates a hybrid experience where narrative tension and physical trials constantly push the finalists toward Vic’s final judgment.

data.short_description: A provocative reality show where fighters compete for a billionaire’s approval. Naked Porn Battle mixes AI-driven VN storytelling with third-person arena battles as finalists face brutal trials for leadership, pleasure, and victory.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Windows Vista, Windows 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-750, 2.67 GHz | AMD Phenom II X4 965, 3.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia Geforce GTX 660 (2 GB) | AMD Radeon HD 7870 (2 GB)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Windows Vista, Windows 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7, 2.67 GHz
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GEFORCE RTX 2070 or Superior
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
